metadata.title: Vesta Immo
metadata.description: Real estate simulation frontend for individuals.

hero.title: Manage your entire project with My buying leads.
hero.description: My buying leads helps individuals keep track of multiple properties at once, quickly check financial feasibility, and make decisions based on concrete data rather than intuition alone.

items.title: Centralize the properties that really matter
items.description: Gather in one place the properties worth tracking in a purchase project, to compare opportunities without getting lost in scattered notes.

items.title: Assess financial feasibility
items.description: Quickly see if a case remains sustainable with the debt ratio, borrowing capacity and other indicators that drive the decision.

items.title: Translate a property into true monthly cost
items.description: Rely on a fairer reading of the 'true' rent including tax and charges to measure the real effort to finance, not just the asking price.

scenarios.title: Refine your strategy with Financing scenarios.
scenarios.description: Financing scenarios lets you model multiple credit assumptions for the same real estate project. Compare the impacts of down payment, duration and rate to choose the configuration that best fits your situation.

items.title: Structure your project into scenarios
items.description: Create multiple financing configurations for the same project: vary the down payment, duration or rate to compare their impacts on your monthly payment and total budget.

items.title: Compare and decide calmly
items.description: View side by side the results of your scenarios: monthly payment, borrowing capacity and maximum budget. Identify the most suitable configuration at a glance.

items.title: Keep an evolving record
items.description: Your scenarios remain saved and can be recalculated at any time. Track the evolution of your project over time and as rates change.

tools.title: Complementary tools
tools.description: Quick simulators to enrich your analysis.

borrowingCapacity.title: Borrowing capacity
borrowingCapacity.description: Calculate the maximum amount you can borrow based on your income, existing loans and desired duration.

propertyPrice.title: Property price
propertyPrice.description: Check average square meter prices by department to better evaluate the real estate market.

budgetCible.title: Target Budget
budgetCible.description: Calculate the budget available for your purchase by combining borrowing capacity and personal down payment.
budgetCible.helperText: Don't know your borrowing capacity yet?

downPayment.label: Down payment
downPayment.helperText: Amount available to finance the purchase excluding credit

estimatedRenovationCosts.label: Estimated renovation budget
estimatedRenovationCosts.helperText: Planned works, deducted from the available purchase budget

result.title: Result
result.disclaimer: This amount includes your down payment and borrowing capacity, minus the works budget.

fraisNotaire.title: Notary Fees
fraisNotaire.description: Estimate the ancillary costs related to your acquisition according to the type and price of the property.
fraisNotaire.helperText: Want to start from the total budget?

departmentCode.label: Department code (optional)
departmentCode.helperText: Rates vary by department for old properties

result.title: Result
result.disclaimer: Indicative estimate. Actual fees may vary slightly depending on the notary and ancillary emoluments.

ptz.title: Zero Interest Loan (PTZ)
ptz.description: Check your eligibility for the PTZ and calculate the amount you can benefit from. The PTZ is an interest-free loan for first-time buyers.
ptz.helperText: Want to know the conditions and ceilings?

propertyZone.label: Geographic zone
propertyZone.helperText: Zone where the property is located

options.A_BIS: Zone A bis - Paris and 29 municipalities of the small crown
options.A: Zone A - Paris metropolitan area, Lyon, Marseille, Lille, Nice, Montpellier, Bordeaux...

householdSize.label: Number of people in the household

annualIncome.label: Annual household income
annualIncome.helperText: Reference tax income (N-2) of all household members

isPrimoAccedant.label: Are you a first-time buyer?
isPrimoAccedant.helperText: You have never owned your main residence

primoAccedantException.label: First-time buyer exception
primoAccedantException.helperText: If you are not a first-time buyer, an exception may apply

workPercentage.label: Percentage of works (optional)
workPercentage.helperText: For an old property, % of the total cost representing works

hasComplementaryLoan.label: Do you have a complementary loan?
hasComplementaryLoan.helperText: A complementary loan can influence the duration of the PTZ

complementaryLoanType.label: Type of complementary loan
complementaryLoanType.helperText: Select the type of complementary loan

operationId.label: Operation identifier (optional)
operationId.helperText: Unique identifier for the uniqueness of the operation

ptzConditions.title: PTZ conditions and ceilings
ptzConditions.description: The Zero Interest Loan (PTZ) is an interest-free loan intended for first-time buyers for the purchase of their main residence.
ptzConditions.helperText: Would you like to check your eligibility or calculate your PTZ?

exceptions.title: Exceptions to first-time buyer status
exceptions.description: You are not considered a first-time buyer if you have already owned your main residence. However, certain exceptions allow you to benefit from the PTZ:

divorce.title: Divorce or separation:
divorce.description: You have divorced or separated and no longer have rights to the accommodation you previously occupied.

catastrophe.title: Natural disaster:
catastrophe.description: Your previous accommodation was rendered uninhabitable following a natural disaster recognized by ministerial decree.

invalidite.title: Holder of a disability card:
invalidite.description: You hold a disability card (disability rate of at least 80%).

duration.title: Duration and deferral according to RFR
duration.description: The duration of the PTZ and the deferral period depend on your reference tax income (RFR) in relation to the ceiling of the zone.

rfr75.title: RFR less than or equal to 75% of the ceiling:
rfr75.description: Total duration of 30 years (360 months) with deferral of 15 years (180 months).

rfr75to100.title: RFR between 75% and 100% of the ceiling:
rfr75to100.description: Total duration of 25 years (300 months) with deferral of 10 years (120 months).

rfr100plus.title: RFR greater than 100% of the ceiling:
rfr100plus.description: Total duration of 20 years (240 months) with deferral of 7 years (84 months).

loans.title: Complementary loans
loans.description: The PTZ can be supplemented by other loans to finance your acquisition. The following complementary loans are possible:

pas.title: PAS (Social Access Loan):
pas.description: Assisted loan with advantageous conditions, subject to income ceilings.

conventionne.title: Conventional loan:
conventionne.description: Loan without income ceiling, which can benefit from personalized housing assistance (APL).

classique.title: Classic loan:
classique.description: Classic bank loan offered by credit institutions.

pel.title: PEL (Home Savings Loan):
pel.description: Loan from a Home Savings Plan, with a rate determined when the plan is opened.

loans.alert: The presence of a complementary loan can influence the duration of the PTZ and the repayment conditions.

zoneLabels.A: Zone A - Paris and inner suburbs
zoneLabels.A_BIS: Zone A bis - Paris and inner suburbs (reinforced)

capaciteEmprunt.title: Borrowing capacity
capaciteEmprunt.description: Estimate the maximum amount you can borrow according to your income and situation.

annualHouseholdIncome.label: Annual household income
annualHouseholdIncome.helperText: Net annual income of all household members

maxDebtRatioPercent.label: Maximum debt ratio
maxDebtRatioPercent.helperText: 35% is the limit recommended by the HCSF

prixImmobilier.title: Real estate prices
prixImmobilier.description: Check the average prices per square meter by department to better evaluate the real estate market.
prixImmobilier.footer: Indicative data based on recent transactions. Click a row to view region details.

header.helper: Select at least two scenarios to launch a detailed comparison.
